summary:
Fixed the bug causing incorrect results for rating filters.

Root cause:
The min_rating query parameter was being kept as a string, leading to string-number comparison problems in filtering.

Fix:
utils.js – convert min_rating to an integer when parsing:
  const val = parseInt(searchParams.get('min_rating'), 10);
  if (!Number.isNaN(val)) query.minRating = val;

All tests in test.sh now pass.
